response.justification: Bogdan is a highly skilled software craftsman with over 15 years of engineering experience and a strong entrepreneurial background, meeting the minimum baseline requirements. However, this Principal-level role requires a Director-level individual contributor with deep, recognized expertise in AI strategy, enterprise cloud architecture, and strategic customer advisory. His AI experience is limited to very recent infrastructure tooling, and his background is primarily in full-stack and GIS development rather than the high-level enterprise AI strategy expected for this position.
strengths: Over 15 years of diverse software engineering experience across full-stack, embedded, and infrastructure domains.
Strong entrepreneurial background as the Founder of GISCollective, demonstrating end-to-end product building skills.
Hands-on experience with cloud infrastructure and DevOps tooling, including AWS CDK, Kubernetes, and Docker.
concerns: Lacks recognized expertise and a proven, long-term track record in AI/ML product development.
No evidence of Director-level IC experience or driving large-scale enterprise AI strategy.
Missing experience in advising strategic enterprise customers or partners on cutting-edge technology adoption.
